untranslatable_reason: This signal requires market microstructure data not available in technical indicators: (1) Order submission costs in basis points relative to transaction size, (2) Counterparty trading history/identification, (3) Bid-ask spread levels, (4) Block size detection. These require order book depth, counterparty database, and cost structure inputs that cannot be derived from OHLCV price and standard technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_15_0 is a qualitative market-making/block trading signal focused on soliciting latent demand through counterparty outreach. The entry conditions depend on market microstructure variables (order costs, spreads, block sizes, counterparty history) and the exit conditions depend on negotiation outcomes (counterparty response), neither of which are expressible using only price-based technical indicators. This signal requires integration with order management systems, counterparty CRM data, and real-time cost calculators rather than a purely technical backtest engine.
